title: Clarified file location documentation in SKILL.md
content: Updated 'Two file locations' table to explicitly show that .second-brain/ lives inside the vault directory, not outside it. Added workspace root .memspren-config as a separate entry to distinguish vault path pointer from vault-internal skill files.

title: Documentation site restructured with multi-page routing
content: Migrated the single-page documentation site to a multi-page architecture with hash-based routing. Added dedicated sections for Progress Notes and Publications.

title: Netlify deployment configured
content: Set up netlify.toml with production-only deployment rules. Only main branch changes trigger deploys.
